who: construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 subcontractor time sheets/month
offer: For construction payroll clerks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes payroll delays. We streamline the conversion of time sheets into payroll reports instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
problem: Manual processing of subcontractor time sheets leads to payroll delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction payroll clerks
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction payroll clerks with demo video
Community forums where payroll clerks share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
